subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down whatsoever He willeth through His command and manifesteth it at one time in the form of spirit and at another in the temple of flesh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ینزل ما یشاء بامره و یظهره مره علی هیئه روح ثم علی هیکل جسد ثم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God
